description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided chalkboard advertising board with a rustic wooden frame. The board is supported by two angled legs, forming an A-frame structure that allows it to stand independently on flat surfaces. One side of the chalkboard displays handwritten text in white chalk, reading 'Open for Dine in And Patio,' while the other side reads 'Now Open for Dine In! We Are Hiring! Apply Inside.' The frame appears weathered, with visible wear and a natural wood finish, suggesting outdoor use. The chalkboard surfaces are matte and slightly worn, with visible chalk residue and smudges. The overall design is utilitarian and commonly found outside restaurants, cafes, or shops in urban environments.
description: A rustic, double-sided wooden A-frame chalkboard with handwritten messages in white chalk, designed for outdoor advertising. The board features a weathered wood frame and visible chalk residue on both sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing a chalkboard with the message 'Open for Dine in And Patio' in white chalk, framed by a worn wooden border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure and angled wooden legs, with the board's thickness and support clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the opposite chalkboard side, featuring the message 'Now Open for Dine In! We Are Hiring! Apply Inside' in white chalk.
description_view_3: Side view similar to view 1, showing the angled legs and the narrow profile of the A-frame design.
attribute_frame_design: thick wooden border with visible wear and straight edges
attribute_advertisement_content: handwritten chalk messages advertising dine-in availability and hiring
